title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Netsol Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Netsol Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Join the Netsol Technologies family as a Frontend Developer in Surat. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Netsol Technologies:
Netsol Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netsol Technologies!
